mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar as avatar, c.name as categoryName FROM blog_article a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN blog_category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = false

SELECT a.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar as avatar, c.name as categoryName FROM blog_article a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN blog_category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.deleted = false AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND a.mood = #{mood}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM blog_article_tag bat WHERE bat.article_id = a.id AND bat.tag_id = (SELECT id FROM blog_tag WHERE tag_name = #{tag} LIMIT 1) )
ORDER BY
a.is_top DESC,
a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
